{"activeBranchId":0,"chainList":[{"description":"共鸣技能磁殛咆哮和召雷磁爆伤害提升70%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716030929951.png","name":"矛盾的抉择","order":1,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣技能磁殛爆发命中时额外恢复5点【审判值】和5点共鸣能量。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031350147.png","name":"牵绊的俘虏","order":2,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣回路审判之雷伤害倍率提升55%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031064378.png","name":"无情的断罪","order":3,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣回路审判之雷命中时，队伍中的角色攻击提升20%，持续12秒。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031031379.png","name":"前行的鼓舞","order":4,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣解放破天雷灭击命中带有共鸣回路缚罪标记、惩罚印记的目标时，伤害提升100%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716030860518.png","name":"决意的回响","order":5,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放共鸣解放破天雷灭击后的30秒内，吟霖的普攻命中目标时额外触发疾霆昭彰，造成吟霖攻击力419.59%的导电伤害，每段普攻可触发1次，最多触发4次，此次伤害为共鸣技能伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716030855914.png","name":"正义的践行","order":6,"unlocked":true}],"equipPhantomAddPropList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png"},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1240","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"47.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"137.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"21.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"39.7%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626039468.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"8.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625855579.png"},{"attributeName":"导电伤害加成","attributeValue":"70.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625358151.png"}],"equipPhantomAttributeList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625411169.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"490","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625640635.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"83.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625513563.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"47.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625349422.png","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"137.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626216694.png","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"21.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625583038.png","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"39.7%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625392298.png","key":"14-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"8.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625555676.png","key":"19-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"导电伤害加成","attributeValue":"60.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626000617.png","k  技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"14-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21.0%","key":"9-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"导电伤害提升10%","groupId":3,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735782914496.png","name":"彻空冥雷","num":5,"secondDescription":"使用重击或共鸣技能时，各获得一层导电伤害提升15%的效果，该效果可叠加两层，每层各持续15秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716032208060.png","name":"湮灭棱镜","phantomId":390077017,"phantomPropId":60000175,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤湮灭棱镜发射五枚湮灭晶片，每段造成23.04%湮灭伤害。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21.0%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"14-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true}]}]},"role":{"acronym":"yl","attributeId":3,"attributeName":"导电","breach":6,"chainUnlockNum":6,"isMainRole":false,"level":90,"roleIconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_icon/1716030488027.png","roleId":1302,"roleName":"吟霖","rolePicUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_pic/1766623266267.png","starLevel":5,"weaponTypeId":5,"weaponTypeName":"音感仪"},"roleAttributeList":[{"attributeId":2,"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"15560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png","sort":1000},{"attributeId":7,"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"2504","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png","sort":2000},{"attributeId":10,"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"1283","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png","sort":3000},{"attributeId":8,"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"101.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png","sort":5000},{"attributeId":9,"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"299.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png","sort":6000},{"attributeId":11,"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"172%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png","sort":7000},{"attributeId":141,"attributeName":"偏谐值累积效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625821120.png","sort":7500},{"attributeId":14,"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"58%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626039468.png","sort":8000},{"attributeId":22,"attributeName":"冷凝伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626002604.png","sort":13000},{"attributeId":23,"attributeName":"热熔伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625261763.png","sort":14000},{"attributeId":24,"attributeName":"导电伤害加成","attributeValue":"94.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625358151.png","sort":15000},{"attributeId":25,"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625723554.png","sort":16000},{"attributeId":26,"attributeName":"衍射伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625298084.png","sort":17000},{"attributeId":27,"attributeName":"湮灭伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626079657.png","sort":18000}],"roleSkin":{"isAddition":false,"picUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_pic/1766623589441.png","priority":1,"quality":3,"qualityName":"初始服饰","roleId":1302,"skinIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_icon/1735783319698.png","skinId":81001302,"skinName":"魆影立裁"},"skillList":[{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"普攻
控制人偶“悬丝”，进行最多4段的连续攻击，造成导电伤害。

重击
消耗耐力操纵人偶“悬丝”攻击目标，造成导电伤害。

空中攻击
消耗耐力，操控人偶“悬丝”进行空中下落攻击，造成导电伤害。

闪避反击
成功闪避后一定时间内短按普攻，将会攻击目标，造成导电伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031066068.png","id":113,"name":"悬丝华刃舞","skillBranches":[],"type":"常态攻击"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"磁殛咆哮
人偶“悬丝”对目标造成导电伤害，并使吟霖进入共鸣技能磁殛状态。

磁殛状态
·普攻和闪避反击命中目标时，触发1次磁殛爆发；
·每段普攻和闪避反击仅可触发1次磁殛爆发，最多可触发4次。

磁殛爆发
攻击所有携带共鸣回路缚罪标记的目标，造成导电伤害。

召雷磁爆
施放共鸣技能磁殛咆哮后一定时间内，短按共鸣技能，将会施放召雷磁爆攻击目标，造成导电伤害。
若一定时间内没有施放共鸣技能召雷磁爆或者切换至其他角色，则技能进入冷却状态。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031639608.png","id":114,"name":"磁殛咆哮","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"指挥“悬丝”引下天雷，轰击敌人，造成大范围导电伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031449534.png","id":115,"name":"破天雷灭击","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣解放"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"利用人偶“悬丝”进行攻击，造成大范围的导电伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031029434.png","id":118,"name":"狂雷飓风","skillBranches":[],"type":"变奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"千面魅影
当吟霖【审判值】满时，重击将替换为千面魅影，消耗所有【审判值】攻击目标，造成导电伤害，命中携带缚罪标记的目标时，缚罪标记被替换为惩罚印记，持续18秒。

缚罪标记
常态攻击悬丝华刃舞、共鸣解放破天雷灭击或变奏技能狂雷飓风命中目标时，附加缚罪标记。
吟霖离场时缚罪标记消失。

惩罚印记
携带惩罚印记的目标受到伤害时会降下审判之雷，对所有携带惩罚印记的目标造成导电伤害，每秒最多可触发1次。

审判值
【审判值】上限100点。
常态攻击悬丝华刃舞命中目标时，回复【审判值】。
共鸣技能磁殛咆哮命中目标时，回复【审判值】。
共鸣技能磁殛爆发命中目标时，回复【审判值】。
共鸣技能召雷磁爆命中目标时，回复【审判值】。
